title: Why Aren't Businesses Using AI Agents Yet? Experts Explain! #shorts
summary: Agentic AI adoption remains slow because the technology is still immature, mirroring early LLM stages. Businesses are now competing to leverage this evolving capability as it develops.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof addresses why business adoption of AI agents remains slow, with experts attributing the lag to immature technology that mirrors the early stages of large language models. The takeaway: agentic AI is still developing, and companies are already competing to leverage the capability as it matures.
